sources.evidence: Curious about what Notion is? We'll show you right here, and in the articles to come.

one_liner.value: Welcome to the connected workspace where better, faster work happens.

sources.evidence: Welcome to the connected workspace where better, faster work happens.

value.name: Building blocks
value.what_it_does: Allows users to build whatever they want, however they want.

value.name: Pages and subpages
value.what_it_does: Enables users to create fresh canvases and organize pages inside pages.
value.why_it_matters: Helps users structure their workspace intuitively without folders.

value.name: Databases
value.what_it_does: Helps manage and organize pages, with actions such as editing database properties, views, filters, and sorts.

value.name: Templates
value.what_it_does: Provides pre-designed templates that can be adopted and customized.
value.why_it_matters: Allows for quicker setup and versatility for solving various challenges.

value.name: Page sharing
value.what_it_does: Allows users to share pages with select people, teams, or publicly on the web.

value.name: Team communication features
value.what_it_does: Improves and increases the velocity of communication within teams.
value.why_it_matters: Enhances collaboration, even across time zones.

value.name: Badges and certifications through Notion Academy
value.what_it_does: Provides opportunities to earn badges and certifications.
value.why_it_matters: Helps build expertise in using Notion.

sources.evidence: Think of Notion as a bottomless bin of building blocks. Build whatever you want, however you want 🧱... Every page you create in Notion is a fresh canvas where you can add whatever content you want... There are no folders in Notion. Instead, you can organize pages inside pages... inside pages... Databases are a core feature in Notion that help you manage and organize your pages... To help you take on a variety of challenges with Notion, we've created lots of templates that you can adopt and customize as your own... Share any Notion page you create with select people, your whole team, or the entire web... Notion has several features designed to improve and increase the velocity of communication with your team... Build your Notion expertise by earning badges and certifications through Notion Academy 🎖️
No explicit evidence for testimonials mentioned.
No explicit evidence for case studies mentioned.
